nodes.title: Calculate Base Damage
nodes.description: Given an attacker, target, and action, when CombatCalculator.CalculateDamage() is called, then damage = (basePower * agingMod) - (defense * DefenseMitigationFactor), floored at MinimumDamage (1f).

nodes.title: Damage Variance
nodes.description: Given base damage is calculated, then final damage is multiplied by Random.Range(1-v, 1+v) where v = DamageVarianceHalfRange. Result varies within the expected range.

nodes.title: Elemental Multiplier
nodes.description: Given a target and an element type, when GetElementalMultiplier() is called, then returns 1f for None element. Future: returns 2f for weakness, 0.5f for resistance.

nodes.title: Broken Damage Multiplier
nodes.description: Given a target that IsBroken(), when damage is applied via ApplyHitEffect, then damage is multiplied by GameWorldConstants.BrokenDamageMultiplier (1.5x).

nodes.title: Counter Damage Multiplier
nodes.description: Given a Counter action type, when ApplyHitEffect is called, then damage is multiplied by 1.5x on top of normal calculation.

nodes.title: Crit Pressure Build
nodes.description: Given the TurnManager, when RecordDamageDealt() is called, then crit pressure increases by CritBuildPerDeal (0.08) and is capped at CritPressureCap (0.4).

nodes.title: Crit Trigger and Reset
nodes.description: Given crit pressure has built up, when ApplyCritToDamage() rolls below the pressure threshold, then damage is multiplied by CritDamageMultiplier (1.5), isCrit out-param is true, and pressure resets to 0.

nodes.title: Hunger Damage Amplify
nodes.description: Given a target with Hunger status effect, when ApplyCustomDamage is called, then actual damage is multiplied by (1 + stackCount * 0.2). E.g. 2 stacks = 1.4x damage.

nodes.title: Ethical Misstep Multiplier
nodes.description: Given a player character with PiersAppearanceData.IsPlayer true, when ApplyCustomDamage is called, then damage is multiplied by SaveManager.GetDamageTakenMultiplier() which increases with ethical misstep count.

nodes.title: Defense Window Damage
nodes.description: Given a defender and attacker in a defense window, when ApplyDefenseWindowDamage() is called, then damage is calculated using the attacker's primary Strike/RangedStrike action via the full CalculateDamage formula, with crit applied.
